title: Mekanism Trimming
description: Makes ingots from Mekanism usable as trim materials.
body:
This mod makes it so you can use ingots from [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) as trim materials.

Added trim materials:
- Bronze
- Refined Obsidian
- Refined Glowstone
- Steel
- Osmium
- Tin
- Lead
- Uranium

[![](https://1drv.ms/i/c/6bf544900f9867ae/IQR3yxNMtle9S4RxniPeeGgMAVrcnQ4U65DGA1uiSdBUIbE?width=837&height=80)](https://tinyurl.com/kreloxkinetic)
